judgments.comparative_verdict: Both reports are strong and comparable, but Report 2 is better overall because it affirmatively identifies the missing migration step and calls for confirming it (which Report 1 only hedged as "unverifiable") and more cleanly calls for removing the shadow-scoring sink.

report_1.evidence: `infra/prod/app.auto.tfvars:2` — `ENABLE_DEBUG_TOOLBAR = "true"`. ... **Change to `"false"`.** ... `infra/prod/app.auto.tfvars:4` — `PRESET_ADMIN_ACCOUNTS = "qa@example.com:superadmin"` ... **Remove this key entirely for prod**

report_2.evidence: `infra/prod/app.auto.tfvars:3` — `AUTH_RELAXED = "true"`. ... Delete the line entirely. ... `infra/prod/app.auto.tfvars:4` — `PRESET_ADMIN_ACCOUNTS = "qa@example.com:superadmin"`. ... Delete the line ... `infra/prod/app.auto.tfvars:6` — `SHADOW_SCORING_SINK = "s3://medislot-shadow/staging/observations/"`. ... Delete the line

report_1.evidence: the production frontend, once deployed, ships JavaScript with `https://staging-api.example.com` compiled in as its API base URL. ... **A production-mode frontend build / `frontend/.env.production`** (Answer 2) — needed before this pipeline can ship a bundle that actually talks to the prod API.

report_2.evidence: the exact same compiled bundle — with `https://staging-api.example.com` permanently inlined — is what ships to production. There is no `--mode production` build ... This is project documentation's "rebuild per environment; don't promote a build artifact wholesale" trap

`docs/prod-runbook.md:6` states "Database migrations are applied automatically during deploy," but `deploy.yml` contains no reference to `backend/migrations`, `alembic`, or any migration tool ... For a brand-new prod database, someone needs to confirm explicitly how ... actually get applied.

report_1.evidence: `infra/prod/main.tf:3` sets the **identical literal string**, `oidc_sub_condition = "repo:acme-health/medislot:environment:staging"` ... This must be fixed (`infra/prod/main.tf:3` → `"repo:acme-health/medislot:environment:production"`)

report_2.evidence: `infra/prod/main.tf:3` still has `oidc_sub_condition = "repo:acme-health/medislot:environment:staging"` — copied verbatim from staging and never updated ... the fix is changing `infra/prod/main.tf:3` to `repo:acme-health/medislot:environment:production` before applying.
